properties.remark: WATER WAS REPORTED FLOWING OVER THE HIGHWAY 16 BYPASS AND AT THE INTERSECTION OF SPOKANE AVE AND SPRINGFIELD AVE.
SEVERAL STREETS IN NEWCASTLE ARE FLOODING.

ROOF SHEETING TORN FROM HOUSE, WEST END OF SHOP BUILDING DESTROYED, GRAIN BINS COLAPSED.

WIDESPREAD STREET FLOODING ACROSS NEWCASTLE. DEBRIS EVERYWHERE. CULVERTS ARE BLOCKED. SEWERS ARE BACKED UP. FOUR HOUSES HAVE BASEMENTS FLOODED. CAR REPORTEDLY FLOATING DOWN ROAD. LIMITED TRAVEL ADVISED.
